fixes.name: CachyOS lib32-mesa-git Conflicts
fixes.description: CachyOS ships lib32-mesa-git which conflicts with standard lib32-mesa and lib32-vulkan-radeon. This can cause package operation failures.
fixCommands: echo 'Installing individual lib32 packages (skipping conflicts with CachyOS optimized versions)...'
sudo pacman -S --noconfirm --needed lib32-mesa 2>/dev/null || echo 'Skipped lib32-mesa (CachyOS version installed)'
sudo pacman -S --noconfirm --needed lib32-vulkan-radeon 2>/dev/null || echo 'Skipped lib32-vulkan-radeon (CachyOS version installed)'

fixes.name: Root GUI Apps on Wayland
fixes.description: GUI applications like GParted cannot run as root under Wayland without xhost permissions. Installs xorg-xhost if missing.
fixCommands: echo 'Installed. Run: xhost +SI:localuser:root before launching root GUI apps.'

fixes.name: NVIDIA Wayland Flickering
fixes.description: NVIDIA GPUs may flicker on Wayland without proper environment variables in Hyprland config.
fixCommands: echo 'Applied NVIDIA env vars. Restart Hyprland to take effect.'

fixes.name: Bluetooth Not Starting
fixes.description: Bluetooth service is installed but not enabled or active.

fixes.name: No Sound (PipeWire)
fixes.description: PipeWire or WirePlumber may need a restart after initial setup or if audio stops working.

fixes.name: Pacman Keyring Errors
fixes.description: Package signature verification failures. Re-initializes and repopulates the pacman keyring for Arch and CachyOS.

fixes.name: Snapper Filling Disk with Snapshots
fixes.description: Default snapper timeline settings may create excessive snapshots. Sets conservative retention limits.
fixes.detectCommand: command -v snapper >/dev/null 2>&1 && snapper -c root get-config 2>/dev/null | grep TIMELINE_LIMIT_HOURLY | grep -qv '\b[0-5]\b'
fixCommands: sudo snapper -c root set-config TIMELINE_LIMIT_HOURLY=5 TIMELINE_LIMIT_DAILY=7 TIMELINE_LIMIT_WEEKLY=2 TIMELINE_LIMIT_MONTHLY=1 TIMELINE_LIMIT_YEARLY=0

fixes.name: Slow DNS Resolution
fixes.description: systemd-resolved can speed up DNS lookups with caching and DNS-over-TLS support.

fixes.name: Missing CPU Microcode
fixes.description: CPU microcode updates fix hardware bugs and security vulnerabilities. Detects your CPU and installs the appropriate package.
fixes.detectCommand: (grep -qi amd /proc/cpuinfo && ! pacman -Qq amd-ucode 2>/dev/null) || (grep -qi intel /proc/cpuinfo && ! pacman -Qq intel-ucode 2>/dev/null)
fixCommands: if grep -qi amd /proc/cpuinfo; then sudo pacman -S --noconfirm amd-ucode; elif grep -qi intel /proc/cpuinfo; then sudo pacman -S --noconfirm intel-ucode; fi
